data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In PDD Holdings 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Why Is Cancer-Focused Immatics Stock Trading Lower On Thursday?
data.description: Immatics announced updated Phase 1b data for its IMA203 therapy in metastatic melanoma. A deep tumor reduction response was observed in about half of the patients, with positive survival benefits shown. Phase 3 trials are set to begin by December 2024.

data.title: 10 Information Technology Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
Strong Ad Trends And Political Spending Boost Are Positive Catalysts For Roku, JP Morgan Analyst Says
data.description: JP Morgan analyst raises estimates for Roku ahead of Q3 results, increases price target to $92 with Overweight rating. Strong Platform results expected, reaffirmed outlook for accelerated growth.

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee Downplays Inflation Uptick, Economists Hold Steady On November Rate Interest Rate Cut Call
data.description: Despite a slight increase in inflation and a spike in jobless claims, experts focus on cooling price pressures and a softening labor market.
